iree_add_all_subdirs()

loom_generated_cc_library(
  NAME
    error_defs
  GENERATOR
    iree::runtime::py::loom::gen::c_errors
  SOURCE
    "error_catalog.c"
  GENERATED_HDR_FLAGS
    "--header"
  GENERATED_HDRS
    "error_catalog.h"
  ARGS
    "--catalog-symbol=loom_spirv_error_catalog"
    "--fallback-catalog-symbol=loom_error_catalog_core"
    "--fallback-public-header=loom/error/error_catalog.h"
    "--no-runtime"
    "--public-header=loom/target/arch/spirv/error_catalog.h"
    "--shard=spirv"
  DEPS
    loom::src::loom::error::error_defs
)

    features_header_gen
  GENERATOR
    iree::runtime::py::loom::gen::spirv_features
  ARGS
    "--isa-header=${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/isa.h"

    "features.h"
  OUTPUT_FLAG
    "--header"

    "Generating SPIR-V feature header"
)

  NAME
    features_tables_gen
  GENERATOR
    iree::runtime::py::loom::gen::spirv_features

    "features_tables.inl"

    "--tables"

)

  "${_PACKAGE_NAME}_features_header_gen"
  "${_PACKAGE_NAME}_features_tables_gen"
